answer:
The smallest asymptotically is **\boxed{C}**.

**O(1)** represents constant time, which grows neither with input size nor slower than any other non-constant function in the list. It is the fastest-growing (or most efficient) among the options, as it does not depend on \( n \). The next smallest would be logarithmic functions like \( O(\log n) \), but \( O(1) \) is strictly the smallest.
